# Omega Ancient Sword
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Omega%20Ancient%20Sword&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Omega Ancient Sword
| slot = sword
| tier = UT
| rarity = l
| desc = A Omega Ancient Sword, Thanks to: MegaLerio223.

| rof = 100
| range = 
| projSpeed = 11
| lifetime = 450
| minDmg = 180
| maxDmg = 240
| shots = 3
| arcgap = 15
| feedp = 100
| fameb = 6

| bonuses = {{Stat|def|2}}
 
| legendary = 4

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is obtainable from The Shatters|range2 = 4.7}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
